doc_name: FDA Recalls Edwards Lifesciences' CardioVations EndoClamp Aortic Catheter | DAIC

chunks.text: ![](https://www.facebook.com/tr?id=1184247321929582&ev=PageView &noscript=1) ![](http://www.mirabelanalytics.com/mmwap/lnktrk.php?idsite=625) ![](http://www.mirabelanalytics.com/mmwap/lnktrk.php?idsite=625) ![Home](/themes/custom/daic/images/logo.png) ## Eyebrow Menu ![Home](/themes/custom/daic/images/logo-mobile.png) #### If you enjoy this content, please share it with a colleague # FDA Recalls Edwards Lifesciences' CardioVations EndoClamp Aortic Catheter November 10, 2009 – FDA and Edwards Lifesciences notified healthcare professionals this week about the class 1 FDA recall of CardioVations EndoClamp Aortic Catheter, due to the potential that the balloon catheters may spontaneously rupture during surgery. The recall includes model numbers EC1001 and EC65. The device blocks off the aorta, monitors aortic pressure and delivers solution to stop the heart during cardiopulmonary bypass procedures. This product was manufactured from August 2008 through August 2009 and distributed from November 2008 through September 2009. For more information: www.fda.gov/Safety/MedWatch/SafetyInformation/SafetyAlertsforHumanMedicalProducts/ucm189650.htm #### If you enjoy this content, please share it with a colleague ## Related Content ![cardiovascular surgery, impella](/sites/default/files/styles/content_feed_medium/public/JnJ%20logo_6.png?itok=pEXkQh-c "J&J Releases Promising Data from Pilot Study of Planned Impella 5.5 Use") May 4, 2026 — Johnson & Johnson recently announced new data from a novel U.S. pilot single-arm trial that evaluated the ... ![Home](/themes/custom/daic/images/Time.png) ![Home](/themes/custom/daic/images/arrow.png) ![cardiac surgery, pulmonary device](/sites/default/files/styles/content_feed_medium/public/iPerf.jpg?itok=XPLXo4w3 "iPerf Enrolls First Patient in Clinical Trial of Dual-Flow Femoral Arterial Cannula") March 24, 2026 — iPerf, a company specializing in the development of medical devices for cardiopulmonary support, has ... ![Home](/themes/custom/daic/images/Time.png) ![Home](/themes/custom/daic/images/arrow.png) ![ARRS Roentgen Fund Names Cardiothoracic, Neuroradiology Grant Winners](/sites/default/files/styles/content_feed_medium/public/ARRS%202026.png?itok=E1CfCYe2 "ARRS") Feb. 11, 2026 —The American Roentgen Ray Society (ARRS) has announced the following radiologists, as well as their ... ![Home](/themes/custom/daic/images/Time.png) ![Home](/themes/custom/daic/images/arrow.png) ![cardiovascular service, Columbia University, ](/sites/default/files/styles/content_feed_medium/public/Corazon%20Columbia%20partnership.png?itok=QxdZU2Df "Columbia HeartSource, Corazon Partner to Offer Open Heart Surgery Accreditation Services") Feb. 11, 2026 – Columbia HeartSource, an extension of Columbia University Irving Medical Center’s Department of Surgery ... ![Home](/themes/custom/daic/images/Time.png) ![Home](/themes/custom/daic/images/arrow.png) ![N.J.
